title: lilac × persica var. rothomagensis
intro: Lilac × persica var. rothomagensis, also known as the Rothomagnes lilac, is a cultivar of the lilac × persica species, a hybrid of Syringa and Meillandii. This plant is valued for its medicinal properties, particularly in traditional folk medicine, where it is used to treat various ailments such as bronchitis, colds, and coughs. The health benefits of Lilac × persica var. rothomagensis include its antiviral and anti-inflammatory properties, which can help to soothe sore throats and reduce fever. Lilac × persica var. rothomagensis can be used in herbal preparations such as teas, infusions, and tinctures, which can be consumed orally to take advantage of its medicinal properties.
